text:
Annual State code for the individual. 2-letter postal abbreviation
Demographics D_ALIVE_MOS Months alive during the reference year (null if alive all year) 1 - 11
Null/missing - did not die during the year
 D_DIED Beneficiary died during year, indicator 0 - Did not die during year
1 - Died during year
 D_DOD Date of death. Source is Medicare for all with Medicare coverage, and Medicaid SSA DOD from MAX for others (Medicaid date of death from MAX for non-Medicare for 2006) date -
